certify-fourteen.last_note: Lean/Lake bootstrapped (pinned v4.31.0). 4 holes closed: genuine sorry-free axiom-clean H3 registry def (no bound smuggling, verified faithful to ABP2024-def-Hn) + IsCoveredBy.mono_left/.union, coveringNumber_mono_left, icc_covered_by_two — all #print-axioms clean (reviewer-reproduced), promoted to lemmas/. Holes D1-D5 (reduction, discretization, per-box Farkas, atlas, assemble) remain on path to H3_le_14 (lone sorryAx). No bound (D can't beat 14).
certify-fourteen.summary: Machine-checked Lean proof of the EXISTING H_3 ≤ 14 (not a record-break): compress Prymak's 4.66M-box rational-LP/Farkas certificate to a lake-build-checkable theorem. De-risks the Lean LP core reused by A and C.

circumscribed-frame.summary: Replace the minimal-volume parallelotope normalization with a frame chosen to minimize worst-case per-cell count (or a two-frame split) so p=1/2 is never forced; requires re-deriving Prymak's reduction. Lean-hostile, high variance.

generic-thirteen-lp.last_note: Closed H_GEN_EDGES axiom-clean: 12 genuine cube edges covered by same 13 translates of int(O_p*) at witness box p*, exact-rational re-derived (slack 1/35>0), capstone target_star_covered_by_thirteen makes per-box step hole-free at p*. Remaining holes: H_GEN_ATLAS (tile thin even-parity region), H_GEN_GLUE (near-1/2). Not a global bound. Promoted segment_covered_by_two to lemmas/.
generic-thirteen-lp.summary: Generic-regime (p bounded away from 1/2) 13-piece cover of E∪V_p as a finite rational LP/Farkas, certified in Lean (GenericThirteenLP.lean). Carries forward special-case-p-half's Lean-fit A2/A3 engine; load-bearing hole is the redesigned edge-inclusive 13-structure τ′. Preferred Lean-fit lead.

larger-covering-piece.last_note: Reshaped C1 to an impossibility theorem but its load-bearing step is FALSE: claims cube is the octahedron's minimal-volume circumscribing parallelotope (it is not — min box vol=2<8, refuted by A's F2 and reviewer re-derivation). guaranteed_inscribed_set=Op is hard-coded, not verified. C1 hole NOT genuinely closed; uniform line unfillable as set up. C0/F1 distances are true. No bound.
larger-covering-piece.summary: Find a uniform enlargement O_p ⊆ W_p ⊆ int(K) for all p whose difference body covers one marked-pair difference, dropping the per-cell count to 13; contact-only admissibility is the crux.

lassak-glue.last_note: Re-planned partition to even-parity stratum; independently reproduced (exact): all 32 even-popcount boxes 13-feasible, all 24 infeasible boxes odd-popcount, so EvenParity subset of 13-feasible (sound predicate). Closed 4 axiom-clean partition-validation lemmas. Holes still open: H_PARITY_FIT (blocked on sibling instantiating Generic), H_GENERIC transport, H_NEAR, prymak_param (H_RED), Body. Witness p* is odd-parity (lands in Near) - outliner must re-anchor an even base box. Top H3_le_13 registry-faithful, sorryAx via the 5 holes only.
lassak-glue.summary: Top-level Lean assembly of H3≤13 (faithful registry H3 def, correct direction) from a total two-regime partition of [0,1]^6: generic half imported from generic-thirteen-lp, near-1/2 half from octahedral-direct. Case split + partition closed (no sorry); holes are H_RED (Prymak reduction), H_GENERIC, H_NEAR, transport.

octahedral-direct.last_note: Advanced E1b structure: exact-rational illumination predicate (was float in R3), finite corner hitting-set over 8 dirs, honest-limit counterexample (pointed+broken does NOT force corner-coverability) independently reproduced - pins the open content. Budget-le-7 correctly labeled CONJECTURE (12000-body screen, max 5 observed), not certified, not written to held. Load-bearing holes E1a (|B(K)| bound from min-vol-box tilt) and E1b (coverability+budget) still raise NotImplementedError - the near-1/2 wall did NOT close.
octahedral-direct.summary: Bypass the skeleton reduction at p=1/2: characterize the near-symmetric body family forcing p≈1/2 and cover each directly by ≤13 translates (Lassak core + bounded asymmetry correction). Continuum-heavy.

special-case-p-half.last_note: Closed F0/F1/F2 sub-facts (exact, reviewer-reproduced+re-derived); F2 (octahedron min-vol box=2<8) is CORRECT. Holes A1' (uniform rational corner-slack W — Lean-hostile, can't close in contact-only frame), A2 (edge-aware 13-piece rational LP — naive merge edge-infeasible), A3 (atlas) remain open on path to 13. No bound (still 14).
special-case-p-half.summary: Split p-space: generic boxes get a 13-piece rational LP; a neighborhood of p=1/2 gets a larger admissible covering piece W enlarging O_p toward two adjacent cube vertices to defeat Remark 2.3 locally.
